name: Habitant Pea Soup (Quebec Pea Soup)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup celery with leaves, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
EQUIPMENT: large saucepan with cover, mixing spoon.
1. Heat water and peas in saucepan over high heat. Bring to a boil for 2 minutes, remove from heat, cover, and set aside for 1 hour.
2. Add salt pork or smoked ham, ham hock, bay leaves, onion, carrots, and celery to pea mixture and bring to boil over high heat. Reduce heat and simmer, covering, until peas are tender, about 1-1/2 hours. Stir frequently. If necessary, skim off fat. If using salt pork, remove it from the soup, cut into small pieces, and return to the soup. Remove ham hock and discard. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Yield: 10 servings
